name: breezefill-extension
description: A polished autofill browser extension project.

scripts.check: node --check background.js && node --check content-script.js && node --check popup.js && node --check options.js && node --check lib/constants.js && node --check lib/site-adapters.js && node --check lib/field-matcher.js && node --check lib/storage.js && node --check docs/app.js && node --check scripts/test-server.mjs && node --check scripts/capture-store-assets.mjs && node --check playwright.config.mjs && node --check tests/extension.spec.mjs && bash -n scripts/package-chrome.sh && bash -n scripts/package-safari.sh
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm run test:e2e
scripts.release:chrome: npm run check && npm run test:e2e && npm run store:assets && npm run package:chrome
